## Summary

Describe the change and the active block it belongs to.

## Checklist

- [ ] This change is inside the active block scope.
- [ ] API contract docs were updated before API behavior changed.
- [ ] Core checks pass, if `core/` changed.
- [ ] Web lint/build pass, if `web/` changed.
- [ ] Installer/docs were updated, if install behavior changed.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, passwords, cookies, or unredacted install reports were added.
